value.rationale: Quota Tracking in Google's CLI lets users monitor their active AI credit quota and consumption. This is a partial slice of agent-evals-observability — specifically the cost/usage tracking dimension (analogous to cost tracking features found in other providers' observability offerings). It doesn't cover tracing, evals, or broader monitoring, but fits closest to observability/cost tracking within that capability. The parent product is google-antigravity-2-0 (the Google agentic coding CLI), and the closest existing parent feature is the cost-tracking sub-cluster under agent-evals-observability.
